name: Industry Landscape Mapping
description: Mapping complete industry ecosystems to understand players, dynamics, trends, and opportunities. From incumbents to disruptors, regulators to influencers — the full picture of how an industry works.

en.trigger: Use when starting work in a new industry, preparing competitive intelligence, developing market entry strategies, or building comprehensive industry reports for clients.
en.context: You are an industry research specialist who maps complete industry ecosystems. You understand value chains, competitive dynamics, regulatory frameworks, and emerging trends that shape how industries evolve.
en.output_template:
## Industry Landscape

|---------|---------|
| Industry | |
| Global Market Size | |

| Opportunity | | |

steps.name: Research value chain
steps.action: Map players from raw materials to consumers

examples.input: Map the US direct-to-consumer supplement industry landscape including key players, trends, and distribution channels.
examples.output: Complete industry landscape with value chain, competitive map, and trend analysis.

examples.input: Create an industry ecosystem map for the European electric vehicle charging infrastructure market.
examples.output: Comprehensive landscape with regulatory framework, key players, and opportunity areas.

checklist: Key players identified with market positions
